attacking_style: Not a traditional attacker but exploits sprint-like accelerations on climbs and technical ITTs. Shows ability to surprise pure climbers with unexpected climbing power combined with sprinter acceleration.
team_tactics: Insufficient data for clear team tactics pattern. Appears to operate opportunistically in situations where sprint power translates to climbing.
terrain_preference: Hilly ITTs and technical climbing parcours where power-to-weight and explosive acceleration matter more than pure climbing endurance. Struggles with sustained sprint finishes on flat terrain.
vulnerability: Cannot sustain early sprint accelerations through to finish line. Timing issues in pure sprint situations where endurance at threshold matters more than explosive power.
key_patterns: Sprinter with unusual climbing ability that can threaten pure climbers on selective terrain.
Mistimes efforts: accelerates early but lacks sustained power to finish strong.
Excels on technical/hilly ITT parcours where sprint power translates better than pure endurance.
form_trajectory: neutral: 2nd overall at Vuelta suggests strong climbing form, but Dauphine sprint mistiming indicates inconsistency remains
